title: The Snow Swallows the Path
description: On pages 19–22, the snow swallows the path as luffy, Sanji, and Nami are caught in Drum Island’s mountain danger as the snow itself becomes an enemy.
scene: The Snow Swallows the Path. Luffy, Sanji, and Nami are caught in Drum Island’s mountain danger as the snow itself becomes an enemy. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Who the hell said you could just decide to do something like that on your own!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And it's not slowing down at all!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This whole town's going to be buried!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: White Walkie (commonly known as a furry hippo) animal trivia

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your majesty! Please let us on too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Back off! Get your own hippo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Faster, Robson! The avalanche is already right behind us!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I-I-it'll be fine! n-n-nothing to w-worry about V-V-VIV!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: E-even if we get swallowed up, I'll save you somehow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You don't think Luffy and the others could have been...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nami! You're not cold, are you!? Just hang in there for a second!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here, just hold on to this and wait right here!

summary: This part centers on the snow swallows the path, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
